'''âh-k-l''' ('''hakala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xfade|xfade]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-k-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xfade|xfade]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-k-l
|-
! Lemma
| hakala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hakalithi|hakalithi]] || [[word:hakaliji|hakaliji]] || [[word:hakalishi|hakalishi]] || [[word:hakali|hakali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hakaluthuth|hakaluthuth]] || [[word:hakalujuj|hakalujuj]] || [[word:hakalushush|hakalushush]] || [[word:hakal|hakal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hakaluthu|hakaluthu]] || [[word:hakaluju|hakaluju]] || [[word:hakalushu|hakalushu]] || [[word:hakalu|hakalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hakalufuth|hakalufuth]] || [[word:hakalufuj|hakalufuj]] || [[word:hakalufush|hakalufush]] || [[word:hakaluf|hakaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hakalethe|hakalethe]] || [[word:hakaleje|hakaleje]] || [[word:hakaleshe|hakaleshe]] || [[word:hakale|hakale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hakalothoth|hakalothoth]] || [[word:hakalojoj|hakalojoj]] || [[word:hakaloshosh|hakaloshosh]] || [[word:hakal|hakal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hakalotho|hakalotho]] || [[word:hakalojo|hakalojo]] || [[word:hakalosho|hakalosho]] || [[word:hakalo|hakalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hakalofoth|hakalofoth]] || [[word:hakalofoj|hakalofoj]] || [[word:hakalofosh|hakalofosh]] || [[word:hakalof|hakalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hakalĂŠthĂŠ|hakalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:hakalĂŠjĂŠ|hakalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:hakalĂŠshĂŠ|hakalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:hakalĂŠ|hakalĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hakalathath|hakalathath]] || [[word:hakalajaj|hakalajaj]] || [[word:hakalashash|hakalashash]] || [[word:hakal|hakal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hakalatha|hakalatha]] || [[word:hakalaja|hakalaja]] || [[word:hakalasha|hakalasha]] || [[word:hakala|hakala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hakalafath|hakalafath]] || [[word:hakalafaj|hakalafaj]] || [[word:hakalafash|hakalafash]] || [[word:hakalaf|hakalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:hakalasha|hakalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gohakalasha|gohakalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokihakalasha|gokihakalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:hakalnĂŒsha|hakalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gohakalnknĂŒsha|gohakalnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokihakalnĂŒsha|gokihakalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hakalshĂ«sha|hakalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohakalnkshĂ«sha|gohakalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihakalshĂ«sha|gokihakalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hakalrosha|hakalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohakalnkrosha|gohakalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihakalrosha|gokihakalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hakalmusha|hakalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohakalnkmusha|gohakalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihakalmusha|gokihakalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:hakalsherasha|hakalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gohakalnksherasha|gohakalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokihakalsherasha|gokihakalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:hakalngasha|hakalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gohakalnkngasha|gohakalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokihakalngasha|gokihakalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hakalyasha|hakalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohakalnkyasha|gohakalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokihakalyasha|gokihakalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:hakalyamasha|hakalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gohakalnkyamasha|gohakalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokihakalyamasha|gokihakalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:hakalnĂŒshĂ«sha|hakalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohakalnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gohakalnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihakalnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokihakalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hakalnĂŒrosha|hakalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohakalnknĂŒrosha|gohakalnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihakalnĂŒrosha|gokihakalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hakalnĂŒmusha|hakalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohakalnknĂŒmusha|gohakalnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihakalnĂŒmusha|gokihakalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:hakalshĂ«nĂŒsha|hakalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohakalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gohakalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihakalshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokihakalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hakalshĂ«rosha|hakalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohakalnkshĂ«rosha|gohakalnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihakalshĂ«rosha|gokihakalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hakalshĂ«musha|hakalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohakalnkshĂ«musha|gohakalnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihakalshĂ«musha|gokihakalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:hakalronĂŒsha|hakalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohakalnkronĂŒsha|gohakalnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihakalronĂŒsha|gokihakalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:hakalroshĂ«sha|hakalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohakalnkroshĂ«sha|gohakalnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihakalroshĂ«sha|gokihakalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hakalromusha|hakalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohakalnkromusha|gohakalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihakalromusha|gokihakalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:hakalmunĂŒsha|hakalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohakalnkmunĂŒsha|gohakalnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihakalmunĂŒsha|gokihakalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:hakalmushĂ«sha|hakalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohakalnkmushĂ«sha|gohakalnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihakalmushĂ«sha|gokihakalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hakalmurosha|hakalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohakalnkmurosha|gohakalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihakalmurosha|gokihakalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:hakal|hakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hĂŠkĂŠl|hĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hohakal|hohakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hohĂŠkĂŠl|hohĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohakal|hohohakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohĂŠkĂŠl|hohohĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒhakal|nĂŒhakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒhĂŠkĂŠl|nĂŒhĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒhakal|nĂŒnĂŒhakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒhĂŠkĂŠl|nĂŒnĂŒhĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻhakal|nĂŻhakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻhĂŠkĂŠl|nĂŻhĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻhakal|nĂŻnĂŻhakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻhĂŠkĂŠl|nĂŻnĂŻhĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luhakal|luhakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luhĂŠkĂŠl|luhĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhakal|luluhakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhĂŠkĂŠl|luluhĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lihakal|lihakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lihĂŠkĂŠl|lihĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihakal|lilihakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihĂŠkĂŠl|lilihĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kohakal|kohakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kohĂŠkĂŠl|kohĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohakal|kokohakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohĂŠkĂŠl|kokohĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kehakal|kehakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kehĂŠkĂŠl|kehĂŠkĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehakal|kekehakal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehĂŠkĂŠl|kekehĂŠkĂŠl]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
